zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Margaret Mallet於1467年出生在英國肯特爾哈姆時，她的父親William Mallet (1 Daughter)23歲，母親Mrs William Mallet21歲。她於1482年與Robert Sir Browne在英國英格蘭諾福爾可格利斯頓結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年6月19日在英國米德萊可特查阿培爾享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Margaret Mallet于1467年出生在英国肯特爾哈姆时，她的父亲William Mallet (1 Daughter)23岁，母亲Mrs William Mallet21岁。她于1482年与Robert Sir Browne在英国英格兰諾福爾可格利斯頓结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年6月19日在英国米德萊可特查阿培爾享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mallet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean-Yves, Adelard, Alain, Henri, Jacques, Leonce, Lucien, Monique, Philippe.

French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’. Alternatively, from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (from Latin maledictus, the opposite of benedictus ‘blessed’), applied as a nickname for an unlucky person. Compare Malet 1.
French: variant of   Malet   2, an Old French pet form of the personal name   Malo  .

variants.name: Mallette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Donat, Emile, Francois, Jacques, Laurent, Pierre, Rolande.
Altered form of French Mallet , reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Mallett .

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Margaret Mallet was born in 1467, in Chilham, Kent, England, her father, William Mallet (1 Daughter), was 23 and her mother, Mrs William Mallet, was 21. She married Robert Sir Browne in 1482, in Griston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 19 June 1564, in Whitechapel, Middlesex, England, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Margaret Mallet est née en 1467, à Chilham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, William Mallet (1 Daughter), avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mrs William Mallet, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Sir Browne en 1482, à Griston, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 19 juin 1564, à Whitechapel, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Margaret Mallet 1467 in Chilham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mallet (1 Daughter) 23 und ihre Mutter Mrs William Mallet 21. Sie hat 1482 in Griston, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Robert Sir Browne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 19. Juni 1564 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Whitechapel, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Margaret Mallet è nata il nel 1467 nel Chilham, Kent, England, sua padre, William Mallet (1 Daughter), aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Mrs William Mallet, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Robert Sir Browne nel 1482, nel Griston, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 19 giugno 1564, nel Whitechapel, Middlesex, England, all'età di 97 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margaret Mallet(이)가 1467년 영국 켄트 치함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mallet (1 Daughter)(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs William Mallet(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 그리스턴에서 Robert Sir Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 6월 19일 영국 미들레세스 휘테차플에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.
